query: GTA 6 third trailer release date announcement Rockstar 2026
a_issues: A's results are thin on trailer 3 specifics: the Forbes July 10 article only reiterates pre-order info without giving concrete speculation windows (e.g., no mention of late July-mid August projection or exact pricing). The games.gg guide onl favors June 25 as a 'best guess' which is somewhat stale/incorrect once pre-orders passed without a trailer. The rockstargames.com result contains no trailer info at all, adding little value.
b_issues: Includes some lower-quality/noisy sources (Facebook post, Reddit comment) - the Reddit comment gives a miscalculated and clearly wrong date (January 2026) that could mislead if taken at face value. However, the two Forbes results are strong and directly relevant.
reasoning: B contains the exact June 29 Forbes article that matches the anchor almost verbatim, providing accurate core facts (Nov 19, 2026 release, pre-orders from June 25 at $79.99/$99.99, no confirmed trailer 3 date, projections of late July to mid-August, story-focused expectations). This directly corroborates the anchor's most authoritative reference. A lacks this specific article and its concrete price/projection details, offering only vaguer speculation (June 25 guess) without the later, more accurate 'late July-mid August' projection reflected in the anchor. While B includes some less reliable sources (Reddit, Facebook), the two Forbes articles anchor the answer solidly and align with the reference answer, making B the stronger set for correctly answering the question.
